name: Idea Submission

labels: idea, needs-triage

## Idea Title

<!-- A concise name for your idea (will become the asset `title`) -->

<!-- What problem does this idea solve? Who is the target user? -->

<!-- Describe the high-level approach. What type of asset would this become?
     (prompt / skill / agent / workflow / automation) -->

## Work Stream

<!-- Which work stream(s) does this relate to?
     architects / capacity-management / developers / performance-engineers / sre / system-designers / testers / shared -->

## LLM / Tool Compatibility

<!-- Which LLM(s) or tools do you expect this to work with? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How will we know this idea is successfully implemented? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links, references, prior art, or related assets in this repo -->
